title: 【七色のニコニコ動画】 7 Colors of Automatic Mario Douga
description:
a.k.a Nanairo no Automatic Mario Douga
(Nanairo no Nico Nico Douga)

【自動マリオシーケンサ】七色のマリオ動画【完成版】
Uploaded from Nico Nico Douga:
http://www.nicovideo.jp/watch/sm10000771

NOTE: Had to edit to fit the 11 mins lenght.

List of Nanairo Nico Nico Medley tracks: (list double-checked by reddevils500 & amyvitality66)

01: Black Rock Shooter Original song for VOCALOID (Hatsune Miku) by ryo/supercell
02: Heavenly Star Original song by Genki Rockets
03: Do-Dai song from THE IDOLM@STER Live For You! game
04: mi(w)na(w)gi(w)t(w)te(w)ki
(w)ta(www) （Shinobue prohibition symptom L5） / (alt. name: minagiru series) original song by ShimashimaP
05: Under My Skin "アッーウッウッイネイネ"(alt. name: A-u-u-ine-ine song by Paffendorf feat. Leyla de Vaar
06: Night Of Nights "ナイト・オブ・ナイツ" touhou arrange by Beat Mario 
07: Dancing Samurai Original song for VOCALOID (Kamui Gakupo) by KanimisoP
08: Sand Canyon Hoshi No Kirby 3″ game BGM
09: Sky High Hoshi no Kirby Super Deluxe game BGM
10: Pop Star Hoshi No Kirby 64″ game BGM
11: Got The Groove (alt. title: I want to die)

18: Saikyou Pare-Parade Suzumiya Haruhi radio show OP tune

20: celluloid Original song for VOCALOID (Hatsune Miku) by baker

22: Lion - Macross Frontier insert song
23: Seikan Hikou - Macross Frontier insert song
24: Hihon No Mikata Nevada No Mikata - SPASH CM song (thanks to KyoshuLegend36 for the song info)
25: promise (alt title: geddan / Get Down "ゲッダン") song by Hirose Kohmi
26: Tamashii no Rufuran - Neo-Genesis Evangelion movie theme song 
27: World Is Mine - Miku Hatsune (Vocaloid song (by supercell))
28: Beloved Tomboyish Girl - Cirno's Theme (東方 Touhou 6 The Embodiment of Scarlet Devil)
29: Town (Idolmaster)

33: Hakatanoshio 
34: smooooch・∀・ beatmaniaIIDX EMPRESS (Beatmania IIDX 16 EMPRESS by kors_k)
35: Double Lariat - Vocaloid song "Megurine Luka" (by アゴアニキP)
36: Tewi! Eientewi! - Touhou (by Sekkenya)
37: Meltdown  -Vocaloid song "Miku Hatsune" (by iroha)
